subject: Something for every craving 🍕🥗🥐
body:
Groceries, pastries, healthy bowls, or fancy hotel breakfasts –
a buffet of treats is waiting to be rescued in the app!        
( https://clicks.toogoodtogo.be/f/a/-TYy4ejzO0pL4lXYJQkeQg~~/AAAHahA~/XnsmcZPQsRIajZuKzXYTqKfTsOUyytQbN3LvnHYV8-QTBZea_nuEpBBMqBRXrXONb07Gp0IBMMVUj53vdk-pntFP61MjuZYcnIl53YtLcIZawrhX5sUCQc55cx9NU0o1Nf1t5ksZlN4YOWZ1VoaGAiVJ9bS585g2YamNpIHiauM~ )

**********************
SOMETHING FOR EVERYONE
**********************

Groceries, pastries, healthy bowls, or fancy hotel breakfasts –
a buffet of treats is waiting to be rescued in the app! And we’re
willing to bet you’ll find something delicious to treat yourself
to. It’s a big win for both your wallet and the planet. 💚

SAVE A SURPRISE BAG 
( https://clicks.toogoodtogo.be/f/a/Mf2STm-N7DZ4sD3PDcbDBA~~/AAAHahA~/XnsmcZPQsRIajZuKzXYTqKfTsOUyytQbN3LvnHYV8-S0rORpu3iGOhqa2CuSFJjGBs_r-Kr96SdV-CWXCGmaiwWZwBW-r1tkzLUcTSb2Du3psLuAMcjfZyywYoRZANdwABDrcFhh9dP7mYoqpMbF-OaQ35HM7-rY9W9B0qkPs9Q~ )

*******************************
LOOKING FOR SOMETHING SPECIFIC?
*******************************

Carb-loading? We’ve got you.
If there’s one thing we’re not short on, it’s bread and pastries.
Swing by your local bakery and rescue a bag of treats.

SAVE BAKED GOODS 
( https://clicks.toogoodtogo.be/f/a/JB66BaIeyZdccQ3wOW2MiA~~/AAAHahA~/gPJuEZ5-x50s25t3LIOpQ0yuNP-52WQ815GumvSNwth4pCF9CJ3aoo_PwZbVrwg7WtzocOd9bAQLfYuWt2YIw0EX3pzLxXuJ16RF6bvCxXbORHZU9Ex9EFAQb9VS0qP8HfB7Bc_Ug7Bx6riLgOsAiFaBZouYRwFYIof8RXnVDBj9gE3sHMOd0Qy26NxvCoygp2Rx_SeiYicj7vctwTpLF4DyWkwoDsY6uTbTRY4DlLk~ )
      Fridge looking a bit lonely?
Fill up your pantry without emptying your wallet. Our Surprise
Bags filled with groceries are incredibly popular and disappear
fast, so be quick!

SAVE GROCERIES
